nasb.text: What shall we do for wives for those who are left, since we have sworn by the Lord not to give them any of our daughters in marriage?”

esv.text: What shall we do for wives for those who are left, since we have sworn by the Lord that we will not give them any of our daughters for wives?”

cnv.text: 我們曾經指著耶和華起過誓，必不把我們的女兒給便雅憫人作妻子，那麼現在我們當怎樣辦理，使他們剩下的人有妻子呢？”

ccb.text: 我们曾经在耶和华面前起誓，决不把女儿嫁给便雅悯人，现在我们应该怎么办才能使他们剩下来的人得到妻子呢？”
